attributes.value: Here is what is happening with your account today.
Complete every section below to become an approved Badeel vendor.
Once submitted, your profile will be reviewed by our procurement team. This usually takes 2–3 business days.
Editable — keep this in sync with your official registration.
Drag files here or click to upload
Business registration certificate, insurance certificate, W-9 / tax residency form (PDF, max 10MB)
Submit an invoice against one of your active purchase orders.
Only purchase orders with an approved Certificate of Completion that has not yet been invoiced are shown.
Only approved CoCs for the selected PO are shown. Choose one to auto-load its accepted line items.
Select a purchase order in step 1.
No line items yet. Click Add Line Item.
If an advance has already been paid against this purchase order, it will automatically be deducted from your invoice total.
Tax invoice (required), Certificate of Completion, delivery note or other contractual documents
Your invoice has been sent for approval. You can track its progress anytime from the Invoices page.
Track the status of your submitted invoices.

attributes.script: var no = window.__invDetailCoC; if (!no) return; var c = (window.__allCoCs || []).filter(function(x){ return x.cocNo === no; })[0]; if (c) { openCoCDetail(c); setActiveNav(navCoC); }

attributes.value: Send secure registration invitations to new suppliers. Vendors cannot self-register — onboarding always starts with an invitation.
Invite one or multiple vendors in a single action. Each vendor will receive a unique, expiring registration link.
Overview of all vendors invited, registered, and qualified across Badeel.
Request formal acceptance of completed work from Badeel Procurement.
Inform Badeel that work or delivery is complete and request formal acceptance.
Select a purchase order to load its line items.
Add any notes for the Badeel reviewer (optional)
Delivery Note, Service Completion Record, Waybill, Photos or other supporting documentation
Certificates of Completion (CoCs) issued by Badeel. Only approved CoCs may be used to create an invoice.
This list is read-only. CoCs are issued by Badeel Procurement once a Completion Request is accepted.

attributes.script: var d = modelCoCList.getData().detail; if (d && d.poNumber) openPODetail(d.poNumber);
var cr = window.__cocDetailSourceCR; if (cr) { openCompReqDetail(cr); setActiveNav(navCompReq); }
var coc = window.__crDetailCoC; if (coc) { openCoCDetail(coc); setActiveNav(navCoC); } else { showCoCView(); setActiveNav(navCoC); }
var d = modelCompReqList.getData().detail; if (d && d.poNumber) openPODetail(d.poNumber);

attributes.value: You're invited to join the Badeel Vendor Portal
Karim Haddad from Badeel has invited you to register as a supplier on the Badeel Vendor Portal.
The Vendor Portal is where you'll manage your company profile, respond to qualification questionnaires, and submit invoices against your purchase orders.
This invitation link is unique to you and expires in 7 days. If you did not expect this email, you can safely ignore it or contact our vendor support team at vendors@badeel.com.sa.
Badeel · Vendor Relations · This is an automated message from the Badeel Vendor Portal.
You've been invited to join our Vendor Portal
Badeel has invited you to register as a supplier. Complete your registration to start managing your vendor profile and invoices online.
Pre-filled from your invitation. This will be your login for the Vendor Portal.
Secure invitation link · Expires 7 days after issue · Need help? Contact vendors@badeel.com.sa
Your account has been created successfully
Welcome to the Badeel Vendor Portal. To become an approved vendor, please complete your vendor qualification profile — this includes your tax information, banking details, and supporting documents.
Fields marked with an asterisk are required. This information will be used to set up your vendor account and profile.
Pre-filled from your invitation and cannot be changed.
Tell Us More About Your Business
